title: Generate a GraphQL API for User Profiles
scenario: Create a GraphQL API for user profiles. The API should allow users to query and update their profiles. The API should also handle profile validation and errors. The target output should be a GraphQL schema definition in SDL format. The output should be under 200 words and follow the standard GraphQL SDL syntax.
constraints: Must include query and mutation types for user profiles
Must handle profile validation and errors

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the GraphQL schema follows the standard SDL syntax
Verify if the GraphQL API includes query and mutation types for user profiles, and handles profile validation and errors
Check if the GraphQL schema is clear and easy to read
